caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, a red bow tie, and glasses sits in a studio setting. He is sporting a large, grey, fluffy wig and black over-ear headphones. He faces toward the left of the frame, looking slightly downward with a neutral expression. To his left is a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall filled with various framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a white top. To the right of the man, a black garment hangs. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left side says "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and another on the right says "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains relatively still, with only slight shifts in his head position and facial expression as he looks toward the left.
